intent: General content container for grouped information display. Supports title, description, body, and footer actions.

blacklist.description: Do not override card radius and shadow
Do not override styles matching pattern ^bg-(card|background|primary|secondary)
Do not override styles matching pattern ^(p-|px-|py-|pt-|pb-)

aiPrompt: Use Card from @/components/base. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.
